parameters.jsonExample: {"tenant": {"business_id": "uuid-here", "order_id": "CUST_260606_001", "business_name": "مطعم السدة", "plan_id": "business"}, "customer": {"id": "201234567890", "name": "محمد أحمد", "phone": "201234567890"}, "conversation_id": "CONV_20260613_12345", "order_type": "delivery", "items": [{"name": "برجر دبل", "qty": 2, "price": 89}, {"name": "بطاطس كبير", "qty": 1, "price": 35}], "total_egp": 213, "delivery_address": "شارع الهرم، الجيزة", "payment_method": "كاش عند الاستلام", "notes": "بدون بصل من فضلك", "status": "pending"}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ business_id: $json.business_id, conversation_id: $json.conversation_id, order_number: $json.order_number, customer_id: $json.customer_id, customer_name: $json.customer_name, customer_phone: $json.customer_phone, order_type: $json.order_type, items: JSON.parse($json.items), total_egp: $json.total_egp, delivery_address: $json.delivery_address, payment_method: $json.payment_method, notes: $json.notes, status: $json.status, created_at: $json.created_at }) }}

meta.description: Inserts orders into Supabase orders table. Upserts customer record. Replaces Google Sheets APPEND transaction rows. Input: tenant object with business_id + customer + items array.
